synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-17649 Important: Oracle Linux 7 ipa security update
description:
[4.6.8-5.0.5.el7_9.17]
- Fixes  CVE-2025-7493 Enforce uniqueness across krbprincipalname
- and krbcanonicalname [Orabug: 38520120]

[4.6.8-5.0.3.el7_9.17]
- Fix privilege escalation from host to domain vulnerability
- CVE-2025-4404 [Orabug: 38085890]
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-17649

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-17649.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 7 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
ipa-client-4.6.8-5.0.5.el7_9.17.x86_64.rpm
ipa-client-common-4.6.8-5.0.5.el7_9.17.noarch.rpm
ipa-common-4.6.8-5.0.5.el7_9.17.noarch.rpm
ipa-python-compat-4.6.8-5.0.5.el7_9.17.noarch.rpm
ipa-server-4.6.8-5.0.5.el7_9.17.x86_64.rpm
ipa-server-common-4.6.8-5.0.5.el7_9.17.noarch.rpm
ipa-server-dns-4.6.8-5.0.5.el7_9.17.noarch.rpm
ipa-server-trust-ad-4.6.8-5.0.5.el7_9.17.x86_64.rpm
python2-ipaclient-4.6.8-5.0.5.el7_9.17.noarch.rpm
python2-ipalib-4.6.8-5.0.5.el7_9.17.noarch.rpm
python2-ipaserver-4.6.8-5.0.5.el7_9.17.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol7/SRPMS-updates/ipa-4.6.8-5.0.5.el7_9.17.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-7493




Description of changes:

[4.6.8-5.0.5.el7_9.17]
- Fixes  CVE-2025-7493 Enforce uniqueness across krbprincipalname
- and krbcanonicalname [Orabug: 38520120]

[4.6.8-5.0.3.el7_9.17]
- Fix privilege escalation from host to domain vulnerability
- CVE-2025-4404 [Orabug: 38085890]
